reference: You have three main possibilities: one. heart condition, two. shoulder impingement, three. cervical disorder. I suggest performing an MRI on your shoulder and neck along with a quick electrocardiogram. Good luck.
text: You have three main possibilities: one, heart condition; two, shoulder entanglement; three, cervical disorder. I suggest performing an MRI on your shoulder and neck, along with a quick electrocardiogram. Good luck.
